title: AR-SAT Room
public_claim: AR-SAT Room is a design-and-schema handoff for an adversarially robust structured-analytic-technique room.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes an intelligence problem through a Room View that binds triad method, products, and proof; Idea Refinery, Patch Forge, baseline-comparison Evaluation Harness, JSON-Schema entities, command-palette behavior, station drawer, audit timeline, evidence handling, adversarial stress, and reviewer workflow make SAT use inspectable rather than decorative. The handoff names React/Next/Vite as the intended componentization path, while backend, auth, persistence, and vector search remain outside this pass.
